user.title: Connect to Contact Energy
user.description: Configure your Contact Energy account to download usage data for the Energy Dashboard. The integration will poll for new data every 8 hours.

data_description.email: Your Contact Energy account email address
data_description.usage_months: Number of months of historical usage data to download. The backend uses calendar months to compute the exact number of days to fetch. More months = longer initial setup time.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Please check your Contact Energy credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Contact Energy servers. Please check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: Contact Energy is already configured for this account.

init.title: Contact Energy Options
init.description: Configure the number of months of historical usage data to fetch. The backend uses calendar months to compute the exact number of days for API downloads. Changes take effect on the next data refresh.

data_description.usage_months: Number of months of historical usage data to download. Backend uses calendar months to compute exact days for daily data fetches.

forecast_daily_usage.name: Contact Energy Forecast Daily Usage
forecast_daily_usage.description: Forecasts next day's paid usage in kWh using EMA over the last 30 complete days (alpha = 2/(N+1)). Attributes include method, window_days, alpha, mean/std, and 2-sigma band.

historical_usage_anomaly.name: Contact Energy Historical Usage Anomaly
historical_usage_anomaly.description: Flags historical usage anomalies when new delayed data arrives (not real time). Detects if latest paid usage is anomalous (z-score > threshold vs last 30 days). Alerts are based on delayed data; choose your preferred notify method in automations.
